_readme: pipeline v7 — whisper 실측+간격배분+감쇠보정, QA 통과분
title: It's not very good, is it?
expression: It's not very good, is it?

sentences.en: Sunshine, daisies, butter mellow. Turn this stupid, fat rat yellow.
sentences.ko: 햇살, 데이지, 버터처럼 노랗게. 이 멍청하고 뚱뚱한 쥐를 노랗게 바꿔라!

sentences.en: ★ Are you sure that's a real spell? Well, it's not very good, is it?
sentences.ko: ★ 그거 진짜 주문 맞아? 뭐, 별로 좋진 않네, 그렇지?

sentences.en: I've only tried a few simple ones myself, but they've all worked for me.
sentences.ko: 나도 간단한 것 몇 개만 해봤는데, 전부 성공했거든.
